arabic:
وعن ابن مسعود رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ قال النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏:‏ ‏
"‏أول ما يقضى بين الناس يوم القيامة في الدماء‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

english.narrator: Ibn Mas'ud (May Allah be pleased with him) reported:
english.text: The Prophet (ﷺ) said, "The first matter concerning which people will be judged on the Day of Resurrection will be the matter of blood."

chapter.english: The Book of Miscellaneous ahadith of Significant Values
